title: Hugo's Rainbow Snacks
synopsis: Baby Hugo discovers colorful foods in his kitchen, exploring red apples, yellow bananas, green peas, and blue berries through joyful sensory experiences.

pages.text: Hugo is hungry! He sees red apples. Yum yum red!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes reaching for bright red apples on a kitchen counter, red paint dominant with splashy painterly style, paint splatter drips, finger paint aesthetic

pages.text: Look! Yellow bananas! Hugo loves yellow. Munch munch!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes holding a yellow banana, yellow paint dominant with joyful pure color, sensory visual paint splatters, color exploration aesthetic

pages.text: Green peas roll! Pop pop green peas in Hugo's mouth.

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes eating green peas from a bowl, green paint dominant with splashy painterly drips, rainbow colors, finger paint aesthetic

pages.text: Blue berries! So tiny! Hugo picks blue berries. Mmm!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes with blue berries on his fingers, blue paint dominant with paint splatter drips, joyful pure color, sensory visual exploration
illustration.alt: Hugo with blue berries on his fingers

pages.text: Hugo's tummy is happy! Red, yellow, green, blue - all gone!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes smiling with colorful food remnants around him, rainbow colors dominant with splashy painterly style, paint splatter drips, color exploration aesthetic
illustration.alt: Happy Hugo surrounded by colorful food remnants

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color are the apples Hugo sees?
questions.explanation: The apples Hugo sees are red! Red is a bright, beautiful color.

questions.question: What yellow food does Hugo eat?
questions.explanation: Hugo eats a yellow banana! Bananas are yummy yellow fruits.

questions.question: What tiny blue food does Hugo pick?
questions.explanation: Hugo picks tiny blue berries! Berries are small and sweet.
